title: Are Investors Undervaluing Chubb Limited (CB) Right Now?

title: Chubb: A Great Company Wins In Good Times And Bad
text: Chubb has outstanding leadership from CEO Evan Greenberg, easily withstood the challenge of hedge fund P&C companies and flourished despite a low return environment in fixed income securities. Following the ACE/Chubb merger in 2016, the revenue growth rate increased 50% and Chubb has begun to take advantage of the higher bond returns available with rate increases.
